description: A clickable signpost card linking to a related page, containing a responsive image, title, descriptive text, and an arrow link indicator.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard signpost card with image, title, body text and arrow

props.imageAlt: A group of students stood in Weston park
props.title: Student profiles
props.body: Current students tell us about their time in Sheffield.

stories.name: LongTitle
stories.description: Signpost card with a longer title and body text

props.ariaLabel: Uniting experts to address infertility in The Gambia and beyond
props.imageAlt: signs at an infertility awareness event in The Gambia
props.title: Uniting experts to address infertility in The Gambia and beyond
props.body: Societal expectations of becoming a parent soon after marriage are high in The Gambia, but thousands of couples face involuntary childlessness, or infertility. Our international research collaboration is improving fertility awareness, guiding policy and transforming practice.

stories.name: WithLinkText
stories.description: Signpost card with an optional link text label above the arrow

props.title: Join our mailing list
props.body: Stay up to date with news and events from the University of Sheffield.

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple signpost cards displayed in a grid row as typically seen on the website

instances.imageAlt: A group of students stood in Weston park
instances.title: Student profiles
instances.body: Current students tell us about their time in Sheffield.

instances.imageAlt: graphic depicting a seminar, a leaf and a cloud
instances.title: Policy
instances.body: Policy change is vital for a sustainable future and is a core area of our work.

instances.imageAlt: Smoke emerging from a red and white painted factory chimney
instances.title: Carbon legitimacy and disclosure
instances.body: This project explores the relationships between carbon disclosure, carbon performance, carbon legitimacy and economic performance.

notes:
The root element is an tag. The inner wrapper carries the Drupal classes 'uosblock paragraph paragraph--type--para-signpost-card paragraph--view-mode--default' and must be reproduced verbatim. The image is wrapped in a .media--image--figure > figure.imgcapt > picture structure. The .link-arrow div always contains a .scarrow div with a Font Awesome right arrow icon. The optional field-sc-link appears in ~5% of instances as a

above the .link-arrow. The aria-label on the matches the title text in most cases but is a separate prop as they can differ.
